series_metadata.series_title: Executive Staff Meeting Notes (UCRC Administrative Meetings)
series_metadata.series_description: Meeting notes from weekly staff meetings. Attendees include all Commission members, Chief Hearing Officer, Commission Secretary, MIS representative, and Office Manager. Discussion of UCRC internal administrative actions, budget information and other fiscal matters, personnel issues, and other business matters.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office ; Paper: in office
